titleStmt.title: SII 39.238: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 238. (A.R. No. 238 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL MAHĀRĀJA IMMAḌI TIRUMALAIDĒVA (1485-86.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of nañjey and puñjey lands located in and around Neduñjēri by a person named Nāgaiya Nāyaka, one of the servants of the king Saluvaimmadināyakar to the Tānattārs of the temple Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiya nāyaṉār for undertaking certain sacred services in it. Taxes like Kudirai Kāṇikkai, Taṇḍukkānikkai, Karpūrakkāṇikkai, Taṟikkaḍamai, Iṉavari, Pulvari, etc., are mentioned in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī viśvāvasu varuṣattukkuc cellum parāpa varuṣam Āṉi
mātam 2 10 2 śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaviśvaran metinimicurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷu
Immaṭi tirumalaideva mahārājavin Ūḻiyam nākaiya ṉāyakkar tirumuṭṭam
Uṭaiyār tirumuṭṭamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku Āṇṭavar Iṟakku nā
yakkattaṉam Āka pālittu tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷiṉa cīrmaikaḷil tirumuṭṭap pa
ṟṟu Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam Āṉa neṭuñceri nāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa na
ñcey puñcey nilattukku caṉakoyiṟpakuti Āka Iṟuttuvaṉta māvukku Ā
ṟekāl paṇamum kaṭamai nellum Uṭpaṭa Irāca karattil Iṟuttu vaṉta puṟavari vini
yokam kutiraik kāṇikkai taṇṭuk kāṇikkai ṉāṭṭu viṉiyokam kaṟpūrakkāṇi
kkai Āḷ mākāṇi cīvitam Aracu cammā m mala yam camaiyappaṭi nallerutu ko
ṇikai virimuṭṭu naṟppacu nallerumai naṟkiṭā nalāṭu Irāyasavattaṉai Atu
tāvattaṉai kaṭṭiyavattaṉai kāriya poca kāṇikkar coṭi Ōlai Eḻuttu
vaṟttaṉai kāṭukāvalp paṉṟikkuṟaṅku vilai Erimiṉvilai māvaṭai maravaṭai
kuḷavaṭai maṭuvaṭai paṟṟaṭai calattaram vilaiyācaṟuti peṟkkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamai
Iṭaittuṟai Āyam cekkāyam tirikai Āyam kallāyam karuvippaṇam ceṭṭu I
ṟai Oḻukku ṉiṟppāṭṭam veṭṭivari koṭṭilap paṇam Iṉavari pulvari koḷḷu
ppayaṟu Eṇṇai neyi Arici kāṇam Uluppai Āṭa �ttikai kāṭci makanavami Ūḻiya
m Āḷamañci Ūḻiyamariyātik kaṭṭaḷai maṟa ṇum paḻavari putuvariyum maṟ
ṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa palaupātiyum Uṭpaṭak kaḻittuk kuṭuttu Āṇṭavar tirumenikku naṉṟā
ka veṇum Enṟu Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkkum kara pūcaikkum tiruṉāḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum
Iṉta Ūril mutal Uṇṭāṉatu taṇṭikkoḷḷumpaṭi caṉṉatiyile tārai
vāttuc cantiṟātittiyavaraiyum sarvamānyam Āka tuk koḷḷumpaṭi kaṟpitta
Aḷavukku Inta niṉṟayattile Inta Ōlai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu kallilum cempilu
m veṭṭik koṇṭu cantiṉātittiyavaraiyum caṟuva Āka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷa
vum Intaṉiṉṟayattile vanteṟum kuṭikaḷaiyum k koṇṭu tām veṇṭum payir
payir cetukoḷḷavum Immatikāriyil caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷa
Iṉta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉār ka
rkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyil kapilaiyai koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Ivai nākaiyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
